insert into t_wms_adjustment( sdate, ymdhms, factory, storage, barcode, qty, oitemcode, itemcode, source, memo, loginid ) values ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{factory}, #{storage}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{itemcode}, #{adjustItemcode}, #{source2}, #{invoiceno}, #{loginid} )

mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_worklocation (indate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, factory, storage, source,okyn) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), UPPER(#{location}), #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, UPPER(#{factory}), UPPER(#{storage}), #{source}, #{okyn} )

insert into t_wms_worklocation (indate,ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, factory, storage,rack,module, levelcode, position, source) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), UPPER(#{location}), #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, UPPER(#{factory}), UPPER(#{storage}), #{rack}, #{module}, #{levelcode}, #{position}, #{source} )

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, memo, loginid, factory, storage, rack, module, levelcode, position, source, okyn) select #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), factory||'-'||#{storage}, barcode, itemcode, qty, '-', #{loginid}, factory, #{storage}, '-', '-', '-', '-', #{source}, okyn from t_wms_location where location = #{location} and useyn = 'Y'

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, memo, loginid, factory, storage, rack, module, levelcode, position, source) select #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, b.barcode, b.itemcode, b.qty, '-', #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{rack}, #{module}, #{levelcode}, #{position}, #{source} from t_scm_pallet p join t_scm_barcode b on b.barcode = p.bbarcode and p.useyn = 'Y' where p.pbarcode= #{barcode} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_location x WHERE x.barcode = b.barcode AND x.location = #{location} AND x.sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y')

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, memo, loginid, factory, storage, rack, module, levelcode, position, source, okyn) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{memo}, #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{rack}, #{module}, #{levelcode}, #{position}, #{source}, #{okyn} )

(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)), #{oitemcode} )

INSERT INTO t_wms_stock ( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, itemcode, ymdhms, mainkind, loginid, insdate, factory, storage ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, 0, #{qty}, #{itemcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{main}, #{loginid}, #{date}, #{factory}, #{storage} )
mapper.select: select a.oitemcode as itemcode, to_number(a.qty) as qty, nvl(b.location,' ') as location, a.storage, substr(a.ymdhms,9,6) as time, a.invoiceno from t_wms_outbound a left outer join t_wms_location b on a.barcode = b.barcode where a.sdate = #{date} and a.factory = #{factory} and a.storage = #{storage} and a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION' and a.useyn = 'Y' order by a.ymdhms desc
select wccode from t_wms_workmove where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' and source = 'WIPINPUT' and rownum = 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_stock ( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, qty, factory, storage, itemcode, insuser, insdate, ymdhms, location2, workcenter ) values ( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, #{inqty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location2}, #{wccode} )

insert into t_wms_workstock ( sdate, kind, barcode, outqty, qty, factory, storage, itemcode, insuser, insdate, ymdhms, workcenter, mainkind, location ) values ( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, #{inqty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{wccode}, 'WIP', #{factory}||'-'||#{storage} )

insert into t_wms_workmove ( indate, barcode, itemcode, roomcode, loginid, ymdhms, qty, source, factory, storage, wccode ) values( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}||'-'||#{storage}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{qty}, 'WIPRETURN', #{factory}, #{storage}, #{wccode} )

insert into t_wms_unpack ( sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, ymdhms, type, itemcode, lotdate, storage, location, factory ) values ( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{type}, #{itemcode}, #{lotdate}, #{storage}, #{location}, #{factory} )

INSERT INTO T_WMS_INBOUND (indate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, username, itemcode, bdate, seq, qty, scmmex, type, source, custcode) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginId}, 'username', #{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty}, 'WMSMEX', #{type}, 'LOCAL',
(select c.cno from t_scm_barcode c where c.barcode = #{barcode})
(select max(c.cucode) from t_scm_pallet c where c.pbarcode = #{barcode})
)
mapper.select:
SELECT w.RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || w.RACK AS RACKNAME, w.STORAGE, w.FACTORY AS AREA, COALESCE(stats.TOTALCAPACITY, 0) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COALESCE(stats.CURRENTCOUNT, 0) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, COALESCE(stats.UTILIZATIONRATE, 0) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, COALESCE(stats.TOTALQTY, 0) AS TOTALQTY, stats.LASTUPDATED, COALESCE(stats.TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, 0) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY,
nvl(CURRENTCOUNT,0) as CURRENTCOUNT FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, rack FROM t_wms_warehouse WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = UPPER(#{factory})
GROUP BY factory, storage, rack ) w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(l.QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN l.YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN l.YMDHMS_D ELSE l.YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE upper(w2.FACTORY) = upper(l.FACTORY) AND upper(w2.STORAGE) = upper(l.STORAGE) AND w2.RACK = l.RACK) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, (select count(count(rack)) from t_wms_location b where l.rack = b.rack and useyn = 'Y' and l.storage = b.storage and b.factory = l.factory group by factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position) AS CURRENTCOUNT,
ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE upper(w2.FACTORY) = upper(l.FACTORY) AND upper(w2.STORAGE) = upper(l.STORAGE) AND w2.RACK = l.RACK), 0 ) AS ACTUAL_UTILIZATIONRATE FROM t_wms_location l WHERE l.USEYN = 'Y'
and UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
and UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
and (UPPER(NVL(l.LOCATION, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.MEMO, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.RACK, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
GROUP BY l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY ) stats ON upper(w.FACTORY) = upper(stats.FACTORY) AND upper(w.STORAGE) = upper(stats.STORAGE) AND w.RACK = stats.RACK ORDER BY upper(w.FACTORY), upper(w.STORAGE), TOTALCAPACITY DESC, w.RACK

SELECT w.RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || w.RACK AS RACKNAME, w.STORAGE, w.FACTORY AS AREA, COALESCE(stats.TOTALCAPACITY, 0) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COALESCE(stats.CURRENTCOUNT, 0) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, COALESCE(stats.UTILIZATIONRATE, 0) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, COALESCE(stats.TOTALQTY, 0) AS TOTALQTY, stats.LASTUPDATED, COALESCE(stats.TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, 0) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, nvl(CURRENTCOUNT,0) as CURRENTCOUNT FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, rack FROM t_wms_warehouse WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = UPPER(#{factory})
GROUP BY factory, storage, rack ) w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT_old, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(l.QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN l.YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN l.YMDHMS_D ELSE l.YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE upper(w2.FACTORY) = upper(l.FACTORY) AND upper(w2.STORAGE) = upper(l.STORAGE) AND w2.RACK = l.RACK) AS TOTAL_STORAGE_CAPACITY, (select count(count(rack)) from t_wms_worklocation b where l.rack = b.rack and useyn = 'Y' and l.storage = b.storage and b.factory = l.factory group by factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position) AS CURRENTCOUNT,
ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN l.BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(l.BARCODE)) > 0 AND l.USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_warehouse w2 WHERE w2.FACTORY = l.FACTORY AND w2.STORAGE = l.STORAGE AND w2.RACK = l.RACK), 0 ) AS ACTUAL_UTILIZATIONRATE FROM t_wms_worklocation l WHERE l.USEYN = 'Y'
and UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
and UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
and (UPPER(NVL(l.LOCATION, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.BARCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.ITEMCODE, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.MEMO, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(NVL(l.RACK, '')) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
GROUP BY l.RACK, l.STORAGE, l.FACTORY ) stats ON upper(w.FACTORY) = upper(stats.FACTORY) AND upper(w.STORAGE) = upper(stats.STORAGE) AND w.RACK = stats.RACK ORDER BY upper(w.FACTORY), upper(w.STORAGE), w.RACK

SELECT RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || RACK AS RACKNAME, STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (select max(to_number(module)) as module from t_wms_warehouse b where upper(a.storage) = upper(b.storage) and upper(a.factory) = upper(b.factory) and a.rack = b.rack) as modules FROM t_wms_location a WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND FACTORY = #{factory}
GROUP BY RACK, STORAGE, FACTORY

SELECT RACK AS RACKID, 'RACK ' || RACK AS RACKNAME, STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, COUNT(*) AS TOTALCAPACITY, COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS CURRENTCOUNT, ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS UTILIZATIONRATE, SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY, MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED, (select max(to_number(module)) as module from t_wms_warehouse b where upper(a.storage) = upper(b.storage) and upper(a.factory) = upper(b.factory) and a.rack = b.rack) as modules FROM t_wms_worklocation a WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = UPPER(#{factory})
GROUP BY RACK, STORAGE, FACTORY

SELECT IID, INDATE, USEYN, YMDHMS, YMDHMS_D, MEMO_D, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, MEMO, LOGINID,
-- 분리된 컬럼들 직접 사용 STORAGE, FACTORY AS AREA, RACK AS RACKID, MODULE AS MODULENUM, LEVELCODE AS LEVELNAME, POSITION AS POSITIONNUM,
CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 'occupied' ELSE 'empty' END AS POSITIONSTATUS,
-- 날짜 포맷팅 (오라클 방식) CASE WHEN YMDHMS IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS)) = 14 THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE NULL END AS FORMATTEDYMDHMS, CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) = 14 THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(YMDHMS_D, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE NULL END AS FORMATTEDYMDHMS_D, (select carno from t_mi_item t where t.itemcode = l.itemcode) as itemcode_mi, (select itemname from t_mi_item t where t.itemcode = l.itemcode) as itemname_mi, (select sum(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') || ' (' || (select count(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') || ')' as carname, (select count(qty) from t_wms_worklocation k where l.location = k.location and useyn = 'Y') as cnt
FROM t_wms_worklocation l WHERE UPPER(RACK) = UPPER(#{rackId})
AND UPPER(STORAGE) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(FACTORY) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MODULE, -- 모듈 순 (숫자 정렬) CASE LEVELCODE -- 레벨 순 (D>C>B>A) WHEN 'D' THEN 1 WHEN 'C' THEN 2 WHEN 'B' THEN 3 WHEN 'A' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, POSITION -- 포지션 순 (숫자 정렬)

SELECT -- 전체 RACK 수 COUNT(DISTINCT RACK) AS TOTALRACKS,
-- 전체 포지션 수 COUNT(*) AS TOTALPOSITIONS,
-- 점유된 포지션 수 COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS OCCUPIEDPOSITIONS,
-- 전체 적재율 ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0 ) AS OVERALLUTILIZATIONRATE,
-- 전체 수량 (VARCHAR2 → NUMBER 변환) SUM(CASE WHEN BARCODE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BARCODE)) > 0 AND USEYN = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(NVL(QTY, '0')) ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALQTY,
-- 최종 업데이트 시간 MAX(CASE WHEN YMDHMS_D IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(YMDHMS_D)) > 0 THEN YMDHMS_D ELSE YMDHMS END) AS LASTUPDATED
FROM t_wms_location
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_WMS_LOCATION WHERE upper(FACTORY) =upper(#{factory}) AND upper(STORAGE) = upper(#{storage}) AND RACK = #{rackId}

select distinct a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.sdate as locDate, NVL(c.sdate, '-') as sDate, substr(a.barcode,15,6) as LOT, d.subname_ch as car, a.barcode, a.location as location, B.SPEC AS OITEMCODE from t_wms_location a left outer join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode=b.itemcode
left outer join ( select barcode, sdate from ( select c.*, row_number() over(partition by barcode order by iid desc) rn from t_wms_inbound c where c.useyn = 'Y' ) where rn = 1 ) c on a.barcode = c.barcode left outer join t_mi_typesub d on b.carno = d.subcode and d.typecode = 'MI041' where a.barcode = #{barcode} and a.useyn = 'Y' order by a.barcode asc

select distinct a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.indate as locDate, NVL(c.indate, '-') as inDate, substr(a.barcode,15,6) as LOT, d.subname_ch as car, a.barcode, a.location as location from t_wms_worklocation a left outer join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode=b.itemcode
left outer join ( select barcode, indate from ( select c.*, row_number() over(partition by barcode order by iid desc) rn from t_wms_workinbound c where c.useyn = 'Y' ) where rn = 1 ) c on a.barcode = c.barcode left outer join t_mi_typesub d on b.carno = d.subcode and d.typecode = 'MI041' where a.location = #{location} and a.useyn = 'Y' order by a.barcode asc
select itemname, itemcode from t_mi_item where itemcode = UPPER(#{itemcode})
select a.sdate,a.qty,a.location from t_wms_location a where a.itemcode = UPPER(#{itemcode}) AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND FACTORY= #{factory} ORDER BY sdate desc, location
select sdate, pbarcode, bbarcode from t_scm_pallet where pbarcode = #{barcode} order by bbarcode
select sdate, pbarcode, bbarcode from t_scm_pallet where pbarcode in ( select pbarcode from t_scm_pallet where bbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' ) order by bbarcode

SELECT b.itemcode, qty, completeyn as yn, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_scm_barcode aa where a.barcode = aa.unpackbarcode and useyn = 'Y'),0) as scanqty, print_qty, ymdhms FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE sdate = #{date} and factory = #{factory} and useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY iid DESC

SELECT A.INDATE,A.FACTORY,A.STORAGE,A.WCCODE,A.BARCODE,A.ITEMCODE,A.LOGINID,A.YMDHMS,B.ITEMNAME,C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR,TO_NUMBER(A.QTY) AS QTY,A.ROOMCODE, (SELECT SUM(QTY) FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE AA WHERE A.BARCODE = AA.BARCODE AND SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.INDATE = A.INDATE) AS SCANQTY, (SELECT SUM(AA.QTY) FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE AA INNER JOIN T_SCM_PALLET P ON AA.BARCODE = P.BBARCODE AND A.BARCODE = P.PBARCODE AND SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.INDATE = A.INDATE) AS SCANQTY2 FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE A.SOURCE = 'WIPSENDING' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND A.INDATE = #{date} AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.storage)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{storage}))
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS asc

SELECT a.wccode AS wccode, a.itemcode AS itemcode, a.qty AS qty, a.barcode AS barcode, substr(a.ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(a.ymdhms,11,2) as ymdhms FROM t_wms_workmove a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, ymdhms FROM ( SELECT s.barcode, s.ymdhms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY s.barcode ORDER BY s.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_workmove s WHERE s.source = 'WIPSENDING' AND s.useyn = 'Y' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) s ON s.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.source = 'WIPINPUT' AND a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.indate = #{date}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.storage)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{storage}))
ORDER BY a.ymdhms desc

select itemcode, sum(qty) as qty, nvl(ROOMCODE,factory||'-'||storage) as roomcode, substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2) as ymdhms from t_wms_WORKMOVE where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' group by itemcode,substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2),ROOMCODE, factory, storage order by max(ymdhms) desc

select itemcode, sum(qty) as sumqty from t_wms_WORKMOVE where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'WIPINPUT' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' group by itemcode order by itemcode

select itemcode, sum(qty) as qty, location, substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2) as ymdhms from t_wms_WORKLOCATION where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'FEEDING' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' group by itemcode, location, ymdhms order by max(ymdhms) desc

select itemcode, sum(qty) as sumqty from t_wms_WORKLOCATION where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'FEEDING' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' group by itemcode order by itemcode

SELECT b.useyn as yn, b.barcode, b.itemname, b.itemcode, b.qty, b.madate, nvl((select location from t_scm_pallet p left join t_wms_location l2 on p.pbarcode = l2.barcode where p.bbarcode = #{barcode} and p.useyn = 'Y' and l2.useyn = 'Y'AND l2.iid = ( SELECT MAX(iid) FROM t_wms_location WHERE barcode = p.pbarcode AND useyn = 'Y' )) ,l.location) as location, nvl((select p.sdate from t_scm_pallet p left join t_wms_location l2 on p.pbarcode = l2.barcode where p.bbarcode = #{barcode} and p.useyn = 'Y' and l2.useyn = 'Y' AND l2.iid = ( SELECT MAX(iid) FROM t_wms_location WHERE barcode = p.pbarcode AND useyn = 'Y' ) ) ,l.sdate) as sdate, w.ymdhms as WIP FROM t_scm_barcode b left join t_wms_location l on b.barcode = l.barcode and l.useyn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item d ON b.itemcode = d.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON d.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' left join t_wms_workmove w on b.barcode = w.barcode and w.useyn = 'Y' WHERE b.barcode = #{barcode} and rownum = 1

SELECT p.useyn as yn, p.pbarcode, b.itemname, p.itemcode, --sum(p.qty) as qty, ( SELECT sum(qty) FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' ) AS qty, ( SELECT COUNT(bbarcode) FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' ) AS labelqty, ( select bdate FROM ( SELECT bdate FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode = #{barcode} ORDER BY bdate ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) as bdate, nvl(l.location, w.WORKCENTER) as location, l.sdate as sdate, w.ymdhms as WIP FROM t_scm_pallet p left join t_wms_location l on p.pbarcode = l.barcode and l.useyn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON p.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' left join t_wms_workmove w on p.pbarcode = w.barcode and w.useyn = 'Y' WHERE p.pbarcode = #{barcode} and rownum = 1 group by b.itemname, p.pbarcode, p.itemcode,l.location, l.sdate, w.ymdhms, p.useyn, w.WORKCENTER

SELECT L.itemcode, CASE WHEN B.MADATE IS NOT NULL THEN B.MADATE ELSE '20'||(SELECT MIN(BDATE) FROM T_SCM_PALLET X WHERE X.itemcode = L.itemcode AND ROWNUM = 1) END AS MADATE, L.qty, L.BARCODE FROM t_wms_location L LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON B.BARCODE = L.BARCODE WHERE l.USEYN = 'Y' AND l.LOCATION = #{barcode}

SELECT A.USEYN AS YN, A.BARCODE, A.ITEMNAME, A.ITEMCODE, A.QTY, A.MADATE, B.LOCATION, B.SDATE FROM T_SCM_BARCODE A LEFT JOIN T_WMS_LOCATION B ON B.BARCODE = A.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.BARCODE = #{barcode}

WITH inv AS ( SELECT arrival_date, invoice_no, confirm_yn, SUM(qty) AS qty FROM t_mex_scm_invoice@ptlink GROUP BY arrival_date, invoice_no, confirm_yn ), inb AS ( -- INBOUND 스캔 합계 (useyn='Y') SELECT invoiceno, SUM(qty) AS scanQty FROM t_wms_inbound WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY invoiceno ) SELECT i.arrival_date, i.invoice_no, i.qty, NVL(b.scanQty,0) AS scanQty FROM inv i LEFT JOIN inb b ON b.invoiceno = i.invoice_no WHERE --i.confirm_yn = 'Y' i.qty is not null and i.qty !=0 AND ARRIVAL_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND i.qty = b.scanQty
AND (b.scanqty IS NULL OR b.scanqty <> i.qty)
ORDER BY i.arrival_date desc, i.invoice_no

SELECT a.itemcode, a.qty, NVL(SUM(b.qty), 0) as scanqty FROM T_MEX_SCM_INVOICE@ptlink a LEFT OUTER JOIN T_WMS_INBOUND b ON a.invoice_no = b.invoiceno AND b.useyn = 'Y' and a.itemcode = b.itemcode WHERE a.invoice_no = #{invoiceNo} AND a.useyn = 'Y' group by a.itemcode, a.qty ORDER BY a.ITEMCODE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_wms_inbound SET useyn = 'N' WHERE iid = ( SELECT MAX(iid) FROM t_wms_inbound WHERE barcode = #{barcode} )
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_inbound (sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, username, itemcode, bdate, seq, qty, scmmex, type, source, storage,factory, custcode,custname, oitemcode, OKYN) select #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{username}, #{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{scmmex}, #{type}, #{source}, #{storage}, #{factory}, NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), ''), (SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = (NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), '')) ), #{oitemcode}, 'N' FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO t_wms_stock ( SDATE, BARCODE, QTY, STORAGE, ITEMCODE, LOGINID, INSDATE, YMDHMS, mainkind, kind, outqty, inqty, location, factory ) values( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{main}, #{kind}, #{qty}, 0, #{location}, #{factory} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.iid, NVL(a.oitemcode, ' ') AS itemcode, TO_NUMBER(a.qty) AS qty, NVL(b.location,' ') AS location, NVL(a.storage, ' ') AS storage, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms,9,6) AS time FROM t_wms_inbound a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, location FROM ( SELECT barcode, location, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY barcode ORDER BY ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_location ) WHERE rn = 1 ) B ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.sdate = #{date} AND a.source = 'INCOMINGRETURN' and a.useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC

SELECT a.iid, NVL(a.oitemcode, ' ') AS itemcode, TO_NUMBER(a.qty) AS qty, NVL(b.location,' ') AS location, NVL(a.storage, ' ') AS storage, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms,9,6) AS time FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, location FROM ( SELECT barcode, location, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY barcode ORDER BY ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_location ) WHERE rn = 1 ) B ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.sdate = #{date} and a.storage = #{storage} and a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source IN ('LOAD')
and a.custname LIKE '%' || #{custname} ||'%'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC

SELECT a.iid, NVL(a.oitemcode, ' ') AS itemcode, TO_NUMBER(a.qty) AS qty, NVL(b.location,' ') AS location, NVL(a.storage, ' ') AS storage, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms,9,6) AS time FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_wms_location b ON a.barcode = b.barcode AND B.USEYN ='Y' WHERE a.sdate = #{date} and a.source = 'LOADRETURN' and a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.QTY IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC
mapper.update: update t_scm_pallet set useyn = 'N', memo_d = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where pbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
update t_scm_barcode set useyn = 'N', useynremark = #{dmemo}, useyn_ymdhms = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.select: select (select qty from t_wms_unpack u where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y') as totalqty, barcode, qty, useyn from t_scm_barcode where unpackbarcode = #{barcode} order by useyn desc, barcode asc
mapper.update: update t_wms_unpack set completeyn = 'Y', complete_ymdhms = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.select: select itemcode, sum(qty) as qty, nvl(ROOMCODE,' ') as location, substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2) as time from t_wms_WORKMOVE where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'WIPRETURN' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' and useyn = 'Y' group by itemcode,substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2),ROOMCODE order by max(ymdhms) desc

select itemcode, sum(qty) as sumqty from t_wms_WORKMOVE where INdate = #{date} and SOURCE = 'WIPRETURN' and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' and useyn = 'Y' group by itemcode order by itemcode

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.location, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS bdate FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
and UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
and UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
and a.itemcode like '%' || #{itemcode} ||'%'
ORDER BY itemcode, location
SELECT A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, A.ITEMNAME, A.LOCATION, A.LASTSTATUS FROM V_STOCKINFO_N A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND B.DELDATE = ' ' WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode}

select useyn, sdate, kind, barcode, factory, storage, mktime as time, location, work, qty, laststatus, loginid , factory, labeltype, partbarcode, custcode, custname, memo from v_itemhistory v where v.barcode =#{barcode} --AND v.kind NOT IN ('UNPACKSUB')
SELECT WCCODE FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode} AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY IID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = #{custCode}

SELECT a.barcode as barcodeone, b.itemname, a.itemcode, c.indate, a.storage FROM t_wms_stock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_wms_inbound c ON a.barcode = c.barcode where a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.barcode IN
#{bc}

select distinct barcode from t_wms_location where UPPER(location) like UPPER(#{factory} || '-' || #{storage1} || '%') and useyn = 'Y' and barcode in
#{barcode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_stockmove( sdate, itemcode, barcode, qty, factory, storage1, storage2, ymdhms, loginid, okyn, source ) values( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage1}, #{storage2}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{okyn}, #{movesource} )

insert into t_wms_workmove ( indate, barcode, itemcode, roomcode, loginid, ymdhms, qty, source, factory, storage, wccode, okyn ) values( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}||'-'||#{storage}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{qty}, #{source}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{factory}||'-'||#{wstorage}, #{okyn} )

insert into t_wms_stock( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, factory, storage, factory2, storage2, itemcode, loginid, insdate, ymdhms, mainkind ) values( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, #{inqty}, #{outqty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage1}, #{factory2}, #{storage2}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{mainkind} )
mapper.select: select sdate, itemcode, qty, factory, storage1, substr(ymdhms,9,6) as time from t_wms_stockmove where sdate = #{date} and factory = #{factory} AND STORAGE1 LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' and useyn = 'Y' order by iid desc

select sdate, factory, storage1, itemcode, SUM(qty) as sumqty from t_wms_stockmove where sdate = #{date} and factory = #{factory} AND STORAGE1 LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' and useyn = 'Y' group by sdate, factory, storage1, itemcode order by storage1
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_factorymove( sdate, itemcode, barcode, qty, factory, movefactory, storage, ymdhms, source, loginid, okyn ) values( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{moveFactory}, #{storage}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{source}, #{loginid}, #{okyn} )

insert into t_wms_stock( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, factory, factory2, storage, storage2, itemcode, insuser, insdate, ymdhms, mainkind ) values( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, 0, #{outqty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{moveFactory}, #{storage}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{mainkind} )

insert into t_wms_stock( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, factory, storage, itemcode, insuser, insdate, ymdhms, mainkind ) values( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, 0, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{mainkind} )
mapper.select: select f.sdate, f.itemcode, f.qty, f.factory, f.storage, b.itemname, substr(f.ymdhms,9,6) as time from t_wms_factorymove f LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON f.itemcode = b.itemcode where f.sdate = #{date} and f.useyn = 'Y' and factory LIKE '%'||#{factory}||'%' AND STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%'

select f.sdate, f.factory, f.storage, f.itemcode, SUM(f.qty) as sumqty, b.itemname from t_wms_factorymove f LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON f.itemcode = b.itemcode where f.sdate = #{date} and f.factory LIKE '%'||#{factory}||'%' and f.useyn = 'Y' AND f.STORAGE LIKE '%'||#{storage}||'%' group by f.sdate, f.factory, f.storage, f.itemcode, b.itemname
select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 and (substr(cu_code,1,1) <> 'K' and cu_code != '0001') order by cu_sangho
select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 and (substr(cu_code,1,1) = 'K' or cu_code = '0001') order by cu_sangho
select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 order by cu_sangho
select cu_code || '_' || cu_sangho as cust from c_cust where chk_sale=1 order by cu_code
select laststatus from v_itemhistory where (kind = 'BARCODE' or kind = 'PALLET') and barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT p.pbarcode AS barcode, p.laststatus FROM t_scm_pallet p WHERE p.pbarcode = #{barcode} UNION ALL SELECT c.bbarcode AS barcode, b.laststatus FROM t_scm_pallet c JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON b.barcode = c.bbarcode WHERE c.pbarcode = #{barcode} ) x WHERE NVL(x.laststatus, -1) NOT IN (10, 20)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND NVL(laststatus, -1) NOT IN (10, 20)

SELECT l.barcode, l.sdate, c.subname_ch as car, l.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(l.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (l.rack IS NULL OR l.rack = '-') AND l.useyn = 'Y' and factory = #{factory} and storage = #{storage} GROUP BY l.barcode, l.sdate, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, b.itemname ORDER BY l.itemcode, l.sdate desc, l.barcode
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_factorymove( sdate, itemcode, barcode, qty, factory, storage, ymdhms, source , loginid, movefactory, movestorage, okyn ) values( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{source}, #{loginid}, #{factory2}, #{storage2}, #{okyn} )
mapper.select: select storage from t_wms_location where barcode = #{barcode} AND USEYN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

select * from( select factory,source,sum(qty),count(qty) from t_wms_inbound where sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y' group by factory,source UNION ALL select factory,source,sum(qty),count(qty) from t_wms_workmove where sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y'group by factory,source UNION ALL select factory,source,sum(qty),count(qty) from t_wms_outbound where sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y' group by factory,source UNION ALL select factory,'SEMI-PRODUCT'AS SOURCE, sum(qty),count(qty) from T_WMS_SEMIWORK where Sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y' group by factory UNION ALL select factory,'Count-Location'AS SOURCE, sum(qty),count(qty) from T_WMS_REALSTOCK where Sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y' AND SCANTYPE = 'LOCATION' group by factory UNION ALL select factory,'Count-Barcode'AS SOURCE, sum(qty),count(qty) from T_WMS_REALSTOCK where Sdate = #{date} and useyn = 'Y' AND SCANTYPE = 'BARCODE' group by factory ) where UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) order by factory, SOURCE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wms_inbound ( sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, qty, type, source, storage, factory, source2, custcode,
custname, okyn ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{type}, 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION', #{storage2}, #{factory2}, #{memo}, (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM T_MI_ITEM WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} AND CMB_ITEMTYPE = '006' AND FREEOFCHARGE =1 ) THEN '0039' ELSE NVL(( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = #{itemcode} ORDER BY condate DESC )WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ), '') END AS CUSTCODE FROM DUAL),
(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = ( CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM T_MI_ITEM WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} AND CMB_ITEMTYPE = '006' AND FREEOFCHARGE =1) THEN '0039' ELSE NVL(( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_mi_price_buycust WHERE itemcode = #{itemcode} ORDER BY condate DESC )WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ), '') END)), #{okyn} )
mapper.select: select NVL(labeltype,'NONE') from t_scm_barcode where barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.update: update t_wms_worklocation set useyn = 'N', memo_d = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT A.ITEMCODE FROM T_MI_ITEM A --JOIN T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE --JOIN C_CUST C ON B.CUSTCODE = C.CU_CODE WHERE SPEC = #{oitemcode} and deldate = ' '

SELECT A.ITEMCODE, A.ITEMNAME, A.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.SUBNAME_CH as car FROM T_MI_ITEM A LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB B ON B.SUBCODE = A.CARNO WHERE REPLACE(SPEC, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{oitemcode}, '-', '') and deldate = ' '

SELECT A.ITEMCODE, A.ITEMNAME, A.SPEC AS OITEMCODE, B.SUBNAME_CH as car FROM T_MI_ITEM A LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB B ON B.SUBCODE = A.CARNO --JOIN T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE --JOIN C_CUST C ON B.CUSTCODE = C.CU_CODE WHERE itemcode = #{itemcode} and deldate = ' '
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_wms_validation ( SDATE, CARTBARCODE, ASSYBARCODE, CARTQTY, ASSYQTY, OITEMCODE, YMDHMS, SOURCE, factory ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{cartBarcode}, #{assyBarcode}, #{cartQty}, #{assyQty}, #{oitemcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{source}, #{factory} )

insert into t_wms_inspection ( sdate, itemcode, barcode, qty, okqty, ngqty, judgment, factory, storage, loginid, source, source2, ymdhms, barcode2) values ( #{date}, #{itemcode}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{source2}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{loginid}, #{source}, #{source2}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{barcode} )

insert into t_wms_conditionchange (sdate, itemcode, factory, storage, qty, barcode, oldokyn, newokyn, ymdhms, loginid, source, source2) values (#{date}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{qty}, #{barcode},#{oldokyn}, #{newokyn},TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),#{loginid}, #{source}, #{source2})
mapper.update: update t_scm_barcode set labelType = 'DEFECTIVE', basiclabeltype = CASE WHEN basiclabeltype IS NULL OR basiclabeltype = '' THEN labeltype ELSE basiclabeltype || ',' || labeltype END where barcode = #{barcode}
